assessment.note: Names a specific absence — substantive feedback on key decisions — which signals strain and mild disengagement; also suggests a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Delegation boundary
new_queue.name: What work are you still holding that someone else could own?
new_queue.description: Tests delegation boundaries and whether senior-level work is being distributed well.

new_queue.label: Steadier rhythm
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel more sustainable?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete changes that would reduce load or sharpen focus.
